privileged_info_summary: The task uses Natural Earth v5.1.2 ne_10m_populated_places dataset, a real public vector dataset containing 7,342 populated places globally. The European extent [-15, 35, 45, 72] correctly defines a bounding box covering major European cities from London to Moscow and from Southern Europe to Northern Scandinavia. The dataset contains 1,116 features within this European extent with a total population of 351.5 million. A hexagon grid with 3-degree spacing would create approximately 260 hexagons across this extent; after filtering for hexagons containing at least one city, the expected count is 156-234 features, well within the metadata range of 15-400. The metadata population bounds of 50M-2B are appropriate for this geographic subset and task context.
